name: United℠ Explorer Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 70,000 bonus miles after $3,000 spend in 3 months, plus 10,000 bonus miles after adding an AU in the first 3 months.

earning_rates.notes: 6x member + 3x card for MileagePlus member's fare.
On hotel stays when booked with the hotel.

other_benefits.name: United Club Passes
other_benefits.description: 2 one-time passes every account anniversary year.

other_benefits.name: Free 1st Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: Primary cardmember and one companion save up to $160 per roundtrip.

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Board United-operated flights prior to general boarding.

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 statement credit every 4 years.

sources.notes: TPG report on annual fee increase Mar 2025.

recurring_credits.name: Renowned Hotels & Resorts Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100/year statement credit on Renowned Hotels and Resorts bookings via United for cardmembers.

recurring_credits.name: Avis/Budget Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $50/yr ($25 × 2) United TravelBank cash for booking Avis or Budget rentals via United.

recurring_credits.name: Instacart Credit
recurring_credits.description: $10/month ($120/yr) on Instacart. Requires Instacart+ membership ($75/yr after 3-month free trial).

recurring_credits.name: JSX Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100/yr on flights booked directly through JSX.

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 off one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order each calendar quarter (DashMart, 7-Eleven, CVS, Safeway, etc.). Requires active DashPass enrollment. Per Chase cobrand-doordash terms.

_excluded: $100 United TravelBank credit after $10k spend (conditional, excluded per Q1)
10,000 mile award discount after $20k spend (conditional + points)
Removed 'United Travel Credit' duplicate (was double-listing the same hotel benefit)
